docs.title: tweak
docs.text:
Fast CLI + TUI for text processing: encoding, hashing, transforms, and more.

# Interactive TUI
tweak

# Direct input
tweak md5 "Hello World"
tweak base64-encode "secret"

# Pipe
echo "Hello World" | tweak md5
cat file.yaml | tweak yaml-json

# Chain
tweak md5 "hello" | tweak base64-encode

Get Started{ .md-button .md-button--primary } View on GitHub{ .md-button }

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• 118 built-in operations — encoding, hashing, crypto, JSON, text, generators, validation
  • Interactive TUI — fuzzy-searchable, keyboard-driven, no flags needed
  • Pipe-friendly — works with cat, curl, echo, and every Unix tool
  • Cross-platform — Linux, macOS, Windows, FreeBSD (amd64 / arm64 / i386)
  • Single binary — no runtime dependencies, installs in seconds
  • Apache 2.0 — free for personal and commercial use

docs.title: Contributing to Tweak
docs.text: Thank you for your interest!

docs.title: Development Setup
docs.text:
git clone https://github.com/OpenSyntaxHQ/tweak.git
cd tweak
go mod tidy
go generate ./...
go build ./...
go test ./tests/...

docs.title: Adding a New Processor
docs.text:
1. Create a file in processors/ implementing the Processor interface:
type MyProcessor struct{}

func (p MyProcessor) Name() string        { return "my-proc" }
func (p MyProcessor) Alias() []string     { return nil }
func (p MyProcessor) Title() string       { return fmt.Sprintf("My Processor (%s)", p.Name()) }
func (p MyProcessor) Description() string { return "Short description" }
func (p MyProcessor) FilterValue() string { return p.Title() }
func (p MyProcessor) Flags() []Flag       { return nil }
func (p MyProcessor) Transform(data []byte, f ...Flag) (string, error) {
    // implementation
}

  1. Register it in processors/all.go.

  2. Add a test in tests/ — see existing files for patterns.

docs.title: Commit Guidelines
docs.text:
• Use Conventional Commits
  • Sign off every commit: git commit -s
  • Keep commits small and focused

docs.title: Running Tests
docs.text: go test -v -race -count=1 ./tests/...

docs.title: License
docs.text: By contributing, you agree your contributions will be licensed under the Apache 2.0 License.

docs.title: Homebrew (macOS / Linux)
docs.text: brew install OpenSyntaxHQ/tweak/tweak

docs.title: Go
docs.text: go install github.com/OpenSyntaxHQ/tweak@latest

docs.title: Quick Install (curl)
docs.text: curl -sfL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OpenSyntaxHQ/tweak/main/install.sh | sh

docs.title: macOS (Universal)
docs.text:
curl -L https://github.com/OpenSyntaxHQ/tweak/releases/latest/download/tweak_Darwin_all.tar.gz | tar xz
sudo mv tweak /usr/local/bin/

docs.title: Linux
docs.text: Architecture Link amd64 tweak_Linux_x86_64.tar.gz arm64 tweak_Linux_arm64.tar.gz i386 tweak_Linux_i386.tar.gz

docs.title: Windows
docs.text: Architecture Link amd64 tweak_Windows_x86_64.zip arm64 tweak_Windows_arm64.zip i386 tweak_Windows_i386.zip

docs.title: Linux Packages
docs.text:
Debian / UbuntuRHEL / FedoraArch Linux 
dpkg -i tweak_*.deb

rpm -i tweak_*.rpm

pacman -U tweak_*.pkg.tar.zst

docs.title: Interactive TUI
docs.text:
Run tweak with no arguments to open the interactive TUI. Use / to search, arrow keys to navigate, Enter to select.

tweak

docs.title: Direct Command
docs.text:
tweak <command> [input] [flags]

# Examples
tweak md5 "Hello World"
tweak base64-encode "hello"
tweak json-yaml config.json

docs.title: File Input
docs.text:
tweak base64-encode image.jpg
tweak md5 file.txt
tweak yaml-json config.yaml

docs.title: Pipe Input
docs.text:
echo "Hello World" | tweak md5
cat file.txt | tweak base64-encode
curl https://api.example.com | tweak json

docs.title: Chaining
docs.text:
# MD5, then base64-encode the result
tweak md5 "hello" | tweak base64-encode

# Multi-step pipeline
echo "Hello World" | tweak base64-encode | tweak md5

docs.title: Output to File
docs.text:
tweak yaml-json config.yaml > config.json
tweak json-minify input.json > output.json

docs.title: Help
docs.text:
tweak --help
tweak md5 --help
tweak base64-encode --help

docs.title: Cryptography & Security
docs.text: Command Description hmac-sha256 HMAC-SHA256 (requires --key) hmac-sha512 HMAC-SHA512 (requires --key) aes-encrypt AES-256-GCM encryption (requires --key) aes-decrypt AES-256-GCM decryption (requires --key) argon2 Argon2id password hash jwt-encode Encode JWT (requires --secret) jwt-decode Decode JWT payload password-gen Secure random password totp TOTP code (RFC 6238) checksum-verify Verify checksum against hash

docs.title: Examples
docs.text:
echo "hello" | tweak hmac-sha256 --key "secret"
echo "my text" | tweak aes-encrypt --key "mysecretpassword"
tweak password-gen --length 32
tweak totp JBSWY3DPEHPK3PXP

docs.title: Encoding & Decoding
docs.text: Command Description base32-encode / base32-decode Base32 base58-encode / base58-decode Base58 base62-encode / base62-decode Base62 base64-encode / base64-decode Base64 base64url-encode / base64url-decode Base64 URL-safe ascii85-encode / ascii85-decode Ascii85 crockford-encode / crockford-decode Crockford Base32 hex-encode / hex-decode Hexadecimal binary-encode / binary-decode Binary html-encode / html-decode HTML escape url-encode / url-decode URL encoding

docs.title: Examples
docs.text:
tweak base64-encode "Hello World"
echo "SGVsbG8gV29ybGQ=" | tweak base64-decode
tweak hex-encode "hello"
tweak url-encode "hello world & more"

docs.title: Generators
docs.text: Command Description uuid UUID v4 ulid ULID (sortable unique ID) nanoid NanoID (URL-friendly) lorem Lorem ipsum text now Current timestamp epoch Unix ↔ human timestamp password-gen Secure password totp TOTP code (RFC 6238) qrcode QR code in terminal

docs.title: Examples
docs.text:
tweak uuid
tweak ulid
tweak nanoid --length 10
tweak lorem
tweak now
tweak epoch 0
tweak epoch "2024-01-01"
tweak qrcode "https://opensyntaxhq.github.io/tweak"

docs.title: Hashing & Checksums
docs.text: Command Algorithm md5 MD5 (128-bit) sha1 SHA-1 (160-bit) sha224 SHA-224 sha256 SHA-256 sha384 SHA-384 sha512 SHA-512 (512-bit) bcrypt bcrypt adler32 Adler-32 crc32 CRC-32 (IEEE) xxh32 / xxh64 / xxh128 xxHash blake2b / blake2s BLAKE2

docs.title: Examples
docs.text:
tweak md5 "Hello World"
tweak sha256 file.txt
echo "hello" | tweak blake2b

docs.title: JSON & Data Formats
docs.text: Command Description json Format / pretty-print JSON json-minify Minify JSON json-escape / json-unescape Escape / unescape json-yaml / yaml-json JSON ↔ YAML json-toml / toml-json JSON ↔ TOML json-xml / xml-json JSON ↔ XML json-csv / csv-json JSON ↔ CSV json-msgpack / msgpack-json JSON ↔ MessagePack jsonl-json JSONL/NDJSON → JSON array

docs.title: Examples
docs.text:
cat config.json | tweak json
cat config.yaml | tweak yaml-json
curl https://api.example.com | tweak json-yaml
echo '[{"id":1}' | tweak jsonl-json

docs.title: String Operations
docs.text: Command Description lower to lower case upper TO UPPER CASE title To Title Case snake to_snake_case kebab to-kebab-case camel toCamelCase pascal ToPascalCase slug to-slug-case reverse esreveR trim Trim whitespace repeat Repeat N times wrap Word-wrap at width replace Find and replace escape-quotes Escape single and double quotes rot13 ROT13 encode char-freq Character frequency analysis word-freq Word frequency analysis

docs.title: Examples
docs.text:
tweak lower "HELLO WORLD"
tweak snake "Hello World"
tweak camel "hello world"
tweak reverse "hello"
tweak wrap --width 40 "a long sentence that needs wrapping"

docs.title: Text Processing
docs.text: Command Description grep Filter lines by regex column Extract field by position pad-left / pad-right Pad string to width regex-match Extract regex matches regex-replace Replace by regex remove-spaces Remove all spaces remove-newlines Remove all newlines count-words Word count count-chars Character count sort-lines Sort alphabetically reverse-lines Reverse line order shuffle-lines Shuffle randomly unique-lines Remove duplicates count-lines Line count number-lines Prepend line numbers morse-encode / morse-decode Morse code caesar-encode / caesar-decode Caesar cipher markdown-html Markdown → HTML base-convert Arbitrary base conversion zeropad Zero-pad a number

docs.title: Examples
docs.text:
cat file.txt | tweak grep --pattern "^error"
echo "one two three" | tweak column --field 2
echo "5" | tweak pad-left --width 4 --char 0
echo "hello" | tweak regex-replace --pattern "l+" --replace "L"
echo "SOS" | tweak morse-encode
tweak zeropad --n 6 "42"

docs.title: Validation & Detection
docs.text: Command Description validate-json Validate JSON validate-email Validate email address validate-url Validate URL detect Auto-detect encoding and decode extract-emails Extract all emails from text extract-urls Extract all URLs from text extract-ips Extract all IP addresses from text

docs.title: Examples
docs.text:
echo '{"key":"value"}' | tweak validate-json
echo "user@example.com" | tweak validate-email
echo "not-an-email" | tweak validate-email
echo "SGVsbG8=" | tweak detect
cat log.txt | tweak extract-emails
cat page.html | tweak extract-urls
cat access.log | tweak extract-ips
